summary: Iteration 3 validates full backend removal + IndexedDB (Dexie) migration + PWA support. All 13 targeted scenarios PASS. IndexedDB 'ledger-budget-planner' created with all 7 tables (settings, categories, budgets, expenses, reminders, savingsFunds, monthlySnapshots). Budget/planned/savings/history/calendar/reports/settings all work. Data persists across reload (hero ₹37,000 confirmed). Reset clears + reseeds (hero ₹0). Export JSON has full Dexie DB shape. Zero /api/* network calls. All 4 PWA files (manifest.json, service-worker.js, icon-192.svg, icon-512.svg) return 200. Theme toggle persists in localStorage['theme']=dark. No blocking errors.

issues: Recharts prints repeated 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warnings during initial render (harmless; container mounts before size is known). Consider setting explicit minWidth/minHeight or using aspect to silence.
Radix Dialog warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' — add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to DialogContent for a11y.

action_items: (Low) Handle race in initDatabase: after `indexedDB.deleteDatabase(...)` + immediate reload, a single-time 'initDatabase failed BulkError' is logged (self-recovers on next reload / db.open). Consider awaiting delete completion or catching BulkError silently during first-run seeding.
(Low, a11y) Add DialogDescription to every shadcn DialogContent (planned/expense/reset dialogs).
(Low, perf) Silence Recharts (-1,-1) warnings by adding min sizing or delaying render until layout measures.
critical_code_review_comments: db.js: initDatabase seeding is not idempotent-safe against concurrent invocations (React StrictMode + fast reload after DB delete triggered a BulkError on duplicate seed insert). Use bulkPut instead of bulkAdd for defaults, or gate seed behind a settings flag.
Native date input (data-testid=input-due) still uses browser default picker; consider react-day-picker for consistent dd/mm/yyyy UX across browsers (carried over from iter 2).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 planned expense (Landlord ₹8000 today), 1 savings contribution (Emergency ₹2000), 1 history expense (₹500) then wiped via Settings > Reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend dir /app/backend does not exist. All state in IndexedDB 'ledger-budget-planner' (7 stores). Only localStorage key retained is 'theme'. To reset fully: `await indexedDB.deleteDatabase('ledger-budget-planner'); localStorage.removeItem('budget-planner:v1')`. PWA SW is production-only; in dev only verify the /service-worker.js file returns 200. Export shape keys: version, exportedAt, settings, categories, budgets, expenses, reminders, savingsFunds, monthlySnapshots.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Minor BulkError on first-init-after-delete is a race between deleteDatabase completion and Dexie re-open+seed; auto-recovers on next reload.
